svg.title: Replay-learned MPPI terminal value grid
svg.desc: A terminal value heatmap learned from replayed MPPI rollouts, with an obstacle, goal, and final executed trajectory.
svg.text: Replay-backed terminal value grid with the final short-horizon rollout overlaid.
low value near the goal, high cost-to-go near risky or distant states
Heatmap cells are the learned terminal values sampled after 6 replay-learning episodes. The dashed outline is the safety margin.
